name: shadowlist-monorepo
description: Shadowlist monorepo — native (Fabric) + web (WASM) virtualization, shared utils, and example apps.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/shadowlist-fabric/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/shadowlist-fabric-example/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/shadowlist-utils/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/shadowlist-wasm/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/shadowlist-wasm-example/tsconfig.json
scripts.build: yarn workspace shadowlist run prepare && yarn workspace shadowlist-wasm-example run build
